    @pytest.mark.asyncio
    async def test_add_bank_account(authorized_api_client):
        # ==========================================
        # 1. ПОДГОТОВКА ДАННЫХ
        # ==========================================
        acc_number = "12122112134531323454"
        mfo_code = "00001"
        eimzo_id = "a88a8d88c142ddb90cc441a9f27d3814"
    
        data_to_sign = {
            "account_number": acc_number,
            "mfo": mfo_code,
            "is_main": 1,
            "eimzoId": eimzo_id
        }
    
        challenge_string = json.dumps(data_to_sign, separators=(',', ':'))
    
        # ==========================================
        # 2. ГЕНЕРАЦИЯ БАЗОВОГО PKCS7 (E-IMZO)
        # ==========================================
        raw_pkcs7 = await sign_with_eimzo(challenge_text=challenge_string, pin_code="1")
        assert raw_pkcs7 is not None, "Не удалось сгенерировать базовый PKCS7"
    
        # ==========================================
        # 3. НОВЫЙ ШАГ: ПОЛУЧАЕМ МЕТКУ ВРЕМЕНИ (Timestamper)

        ts_response = authorized_api_client.post(
            timestamp_endpoint,
            json={"pkcs7": raw_pkcs7}  # Как в JS: { pkcs7: signature_hex }
        )
